== Notes for [[Item:Q105960|Q105960]] ==

* '''Governor of Medina under 2nd Abbasid Caliph [http://www.geni.com/people/Caliph-Abu-Ja-afar-Abdallah-al-Mans%C5%ABr-bin-Muhammad-al-Kamil/6000000007624466659/ Abdallah al-Mansūr], 767-772 AD'''.

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): 167 AH (783 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hasan_ibn_Zayd_ibn_Hasan

Source 2:

Source 3:

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000000163019773

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
